testimonials.name: Mahmoud Hassan
testimonials.content: Abdelrahman is an exceptional developer who quickly grasps complex enterprise architectures. His work on the Data Governance platform drastically improved our data operations. He consistently delivers scalable, high-quality code and brings analytical thinking to every problem.

testimonials.name: AI Olympics Jury
testimonials.content: The diabetes detection CNN model demonstrated a deep understanding of transfer learning and medical image processing. Presenting clear reasoning and an accurate, deployment-ready solution secured him a well-deserved 2nd place.
